name: Baked Beer Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Combine meat, pepper, Tabasco sauce, garlic, chili sauce, dry onion soup mix, and 1/4 cup beer in a bowl. Shape into 6 patties.
3. Bake at 400°F until browned, about 10 minutes. Baste with remaining 1/4 cup of the beer.
4. Continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until well done.
